quests.title: What You Forgot
quests.summary: The stranger who pulled you off the street knows how you really got to Ashfall — and who paid to make you forget. You've proven you'll last. Now press them for the truth, or buy it.

branches.label: Press the stranger for the truth

onFail.text: The stranger goes still in a way that promises this will cost you later. They give you nothing. Today.

onComplete.text: You take it out of them in pieces: a transit manifest with your face and a name you don't recognize, and the word ERASED stamped where a sponsor should be. You were someone. Someone paid to undo that.

onFail.text: The stranger names a price you can't meet in coin or favors. Not yet. The door stays shut.

onComplete.text: Money loosens it where force wouldn't. A name. A face that's yours. The word ERASED where a sponsor should be — and the stranger's quiet certainty that whoever did it is still watching.

assertions.subject: npc.stranger
assertions.note: Knows how the player really got to Ashfall and that someone paid to erase their past; trades the truth under pressure or for coin.
